name: Enterprise Leadership Context OS
tagline: A permissioned AI chief of staff for decision-ready executive context.
thesis: Turn fragmented meetings, messages, CRM records, tickets, docs, and support signals into an executive brief with decisions, risks, owners, actions, and evidence.
audience: CEOs, CROs, CTOs, COOs, chiefs of staff, and enterprise operating leaders.
proofPoints: CRM says a renewal is healthy while cross-system context shows rising churn risk.
Every recommendation carries evidence, confidence, freshness, and permission checks.
Follow-up actions are drafted first, then written back only after approval.
